caption:
Sun-drenched cobblestones, salt spray on my lips. There’s a magnetic pull in the air when you wander off the beaten path like I have here. Who else is seeing the magic that only happens when the locals aren’t looking? I can feel the gaze of strangers, and I love every second of the secret thrill. 
#TravelDiaries #WanderlustWife 
#UnseenSecrets
